body_transformation: The rounded head shape remains intact with spiky protrusions now appearing as jagged, translucent violet shards that emit faint crimson mist. Bulbous eyes transform into hollow sockets filled with swirling pale silver mist, maintaining their large, round prominence. Short stubby legs retain their quadruped structure but become semi-transparent with visible internal energy currents flowing through them. The bulbous purple body color shifts to a deep violet hue with faint ebony black undertones, while the tail tip dissolves into wispy shadowy vapour trailing behind like a fading echo.
signature_feature: Head spiky protrusions: jagged translucent violet shards with crimson mist emissions.
